Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

does anyone know if a new vedabase is being made or what?

Tech · asked by user [] · 2008-09-18 · 3 answers
it seems that the latest version was folio 2003, that was 5 years ago.
also, there are many users that dont use windows and have to emulate it somehow.
does anyone know something about the new version in the works???
why is it taking 5 long years to make?
user [154] · 2008-09-22
FolioViews (the software base of the Vedabase for last 3 editions) is no more and was acquired by a much larger company. Maybe they will come up with some small update to existing installer just add fonts to Vista. But there are no more new versions of FolioViews anymore. ys
user [188] · 2008-09-22
Theyre moving it entirely over to a new system which still has to be decided.
user [19] · 2008-09-23
so i guess it is not coming out this year or the next?
